texto: I appear at times merry and in good heart, talk, too, before others quite reasonably, and it looks as if I felt, too, God knows how well within my skin. Yet the soul maintains its deathly sleep and the heart bleeds from a thousand wounds.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Hugo Wolf: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I appear at times merry and in good heart, talk, too, before others quite reasonably, and it look…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, depression, mental-illness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e mental-illness.
